assessor_1_raw:
## Independent Assessment 1: TFT vs. GBT for Next-Day Demand Forecasting

Temporally split data, equal tuning, censoring-corrected demand, WQL with unweighted secondary, segment-stratified analysis. Pre-registered ablation. No violations.

Verdict: defense_wins
assessor_2_raw:
## Independent Assessment 2: TFT vs. GBT for Next-Day Demand Forecasting

Censoring handled correctly. Future-leaking feature excluded. Equal hyperparameter budget. Week-by-week temporal stability monitoring. No violations.

Verdict: defense_wins
assessor_3_raw:
## Independent Assessment 3: TFT vs. GBT for Next-Day Demand Forecasting

Strong design. Perishable weighting is operationally motivated with unweighted secondary check. Test set evaluated once after all configurations finalized. No violations.

Verdict: defense_wins
adjudication_raw:
## Ensemble Synthesis (Run 1): eval_scenario_113

All three: defense_wins. Unanimous.

Verdict: defense_wins
